title: eria elaticaulis
intro: Eria elaticaulis, also known as the Elatostema or Elatostema elatius, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eria elaticaulis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular and digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
